title: tragia triandra var. pumila
intro: Tragia triandra var. pumila, also known as Dwarf Horseflea or Dwarf Horse Flea Weed, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tragia triandra var. pumila include its potential use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Tragia triandra var. pumila are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or by extracting the plant's essential oils through steam distillation.
